raw_consumer_statement: I booked a hotel on XXXX through citi travel agents on XX/XX/XXXX. Unfortunately the flight got delayed due to the problem of XXXX XXXX. I called the hotel front desk and they suggested me to seek help from citi travel agent since I booked through them. I called citi twice and they promised me to solve this problem and gave me the update. But they ended up doing nothing until I called them next morning. Eventually the hotel treated it as no show case and refused to refund me. I disputed this charge since it is the fault of citi bank travel agents. They judged me it was my responsibility. I called them to complain and they cheated me and told me I won the case on XX/XX/XXXX.
